title: Made for Each Other Pop Up Card
features: Unique 3D Romantic Pop Up card, jumps to life when removed from it's envelope
Can be used as part of a table arrangement, to hold a balloon, or part of a floral arrangement
description: Colourful, memorable & unique elastic powered 3D cards which jump to life when removed from their envelope! each card comes with an envelope & packaging wallet
